positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial tapestry featuring constellations woven with luminous, intricate flora and ethereal mountain silhouettes. The design must be rendered in a high-contrast, vector-style line art aesthetic, utilizing deep indigo, sapphire, and brilliant metallic gold accents. The composition should be perfectly centered, structured like a complex, modern scientific diagram mixed with sacred geometry, ensuring crystal-clear lines, clean negative space, and extreme graphic detail, optimized for screen-printing textile apparel.
